languages.text: {n}Себериан неподвижно взирает на опустевшее ложе Патента, его аугментированные легкие не производят ни единого вдоха — он словно превратился в статую. В священных палатах царит могильная тишина, нарушаемая лишь гудением сервоприводов в аугментах древнего Лорд-капитана.{/n}

{n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан неподвижно взирает на опустевшее ложе Патента, его аугментированные легкие не производят ни единого вдоха — он словно превратился в статую. В священных палатах царит могильная тишина, нарушаемая лишь гудением сервоприводов в аугментах древнего Лорд-капитана.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian starrt regungslos auf den leeren Aufbewahrungsort des Handelsbriefs. Seine augmentierten Lungen regen sich nicht. Er scheint sich in eine Statue verwandelt zu haben. In der heiligen Kammer herrscht eine Grabesstille, die nur vom Summen der Servomotoren der Augmentationen des alten Lord Captains gestört wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian starrt regungslos auf den leeren Aufbewahrungsort des Handelsbriefs. Seine augmentierten Lungen regen sich nicht. Er scheint sich in eine Statue verwandelt zu haben. In der heiligen Kammer herrscht eine Grabesstille, die nur vom Summen der Servomotoren der Augmentationen des alten Lord Captains gestört wird.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian observe, immobile, l'endroit où se trouvait jusqu'à il y a peu la lettre de marque. Ses poumons augmentés sont à l'arrêt. Vous avez l'impression d'observer une statue. La salle sacrée est aussi silencieuse qu'une crypte, à l'exception du vrombissement des servomoteurs présents dans les augmétiques de l'ancien seigneur-capitaine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian observe, immobile, l'endroit où se trouvait jusqu'à il y a peu la lettre de marque. Ses poumons augmentés sont à l'arrêt. Vous avez l'impression d'observer une statue. La salle sacrée est aussi silencieuse qu'une crypte, à l'exception du vrombissement des servomoteurs présents dans les augmétiques de l'ancien seigneur-capitaine.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian observa, inmóvil, el lugar de descanso vacío de la Patente. Sus pulmones aumentados no inspiran ni una vez. Es como si se hubiera convertido en una estatua. La cámara sagrada es tan silenciosa como una cripta, salvo por el zumbido de los servomotores de los auméticos del ancestral Lord Capitán.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian observa, inmóvil, el lugar de descanso vacío de la Patente. Sus pulmones aumentados no inspiran ni una vez. Es como si se hubiera convertido en una estatua. La cámara sagrada es tan silenciosa como una cripta, salvo por el zumbido de los servomotores de los auméticos del ancestral Lord Capitán.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, Ruhsatname'nin boş duran yerine hareketsizce bakıyor. Ogmentli akciğerleri bir kez bile nefes almıyor. Sanki bir heykele dönüşmüş gibi. Kutsal oda, kadim Lord Kaptan'ın ogmetiklerindeki hizmotorların uğultusu haricinde bir mahzen kadar sessiz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, Ruhsatname'nin boş duran yerine hareketsizce bakıyor. Ogmentli akciğerleri bir kez bile nefes almıyor. Sanki bir heykele dönüşmüş gibi. Kutsal oda, kadim Lord Kaptan'ın ogmetiklerindeki hizmotorların uğultusu haricinde bir mahzen kadar sessiz.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安一动不动地盯着原本摆放贸易授状的空位。他那加装了植入物的肺连一口气都没喘，整个人仿佛化作了一尊雕像。这间神圣密室寂静得像是墓穴，只有这位古老的舰长大人植入物中伺服电机的嗡鸣声在回荡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安一动不动地盯着原本摆放贸易授状的空位。他那加装了植入物的肺连一口气都没喘，整个人仿佛化作了一尊雕像。这间神圣密室寂静得像是墓穴，只有这位古老的舰长大人植入物中伺服电机的嗡鸣声在回荡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは、ウォーレントの空いた寝床をじっと見つめていた。彼の強化された肺は一度も動かなかった。まるで石像になったかのように。聖なる部屋は、古代のロード・キャプテンの強化装置のサーボモータの唸り声以外は、墓地のように静かだった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian stares, motionless, at the Warrant's empty resting place. His augmented lungs do not inhale once. It is as though he has turned into a statue. The sacred chamber is silent as a crypt, save for the hum of servo-motors in the ancient Lord Captain's augmetics.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは、ウォーレントの空いた寝床をじっと見つめていた。彼の強化された肺は一度も動かなかった。まるで石像になったかのように。聖なる部屋は、古代のロード・キャプテンの強化装置のサーボモータの唸り声以外は、墓地のように静かだった。{/n}
